items.label: Apify (Facebook Events)
items.notes: Free plan $5/mo credits · daily 4am scrape · measured from billing log

items.label: OpenRouter (AI)
items.notes: Account spend measured from OpenRouter key · programs listed below (not separately metered) · includes Daily Summary digest (scans every 30 min; free-first models) · Tool Library “Search deeper” (manual; gpt-4o-mini fallback, sub-cent per run)

items.label: Cursor (IDE)
items.notes: Pro ~$20/mo ÷ 4.33 · edit to match your plan share for Dashbird

items.label: Google Cloud (Gmail API)
items.notes: Intake Gmail OAuth · personal free quota

items.label: Supabase (Web Catalog)
items.notes: Optional cloud catalog · local JSON is default

items.label: Apollo (company firmographics)
items.notes: Optional APOLLO_API_KEY · org enrich credits for employees/revenue estimates · set weeklyUsd after you have a plan
